languages.text: "А сержант-инструктор Йоваха выдвинулся на защиту красных мантий на северо-востоке".
"And Drill Sergeant Jovakha has advanced to protect the red robes in the north-east."
languages.original_text: "А сержант-инструктор Йоваха выдвинулся на защиту красных мантий на северо-востоке".

traits.locale_text: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha has advanced to protect the red robes in the north-east."

languages.text: 「そして、ジョヴァカ大尉は、東北の何らかの部隊の歯車配給地点を守るために前進した」
languages.original_text: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha has advanced to protect a cog distribution point for some kind of forces in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: 「そして、ジョヴァカ大尉は、東北の何らかの部隊の歯車配給地点を守るために前進した」

languages.text: «El sargento de instrucción Jovakha ha acudido al nordeste para proteger a los túnicas rojas».
languages.original_text: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha has advanced to protect the red robes in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: «El sargento de instrucción Jovakha ha acudido al nordeste para proteger a los túnicas rojas».

languages.text: "Und Drill Sergeant Jovakha beschützt die Roten Roben im Nordosten."
languages.original_text: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha has advanced to protect the red robes in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: "Und Drill Sergeant Jovakha beschützt die Roten Roben im Nordosten."

languages.text: « Et le sergent-instructeur Jovakha est parti protéger les robes rouges au nord-est. »
languages.original_text: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha has advanced to protect the red robes in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: « Et le sergent-instructeur Jovakha est parti protéger les robes rouges au nord-est. »

languages.text: “操练军士约瓦哈已推进到东北方向，去保护那些红袍了。”
languages.original_text: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha has advanced to protect the red robes in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: “操练军士约瓦哈已推进到东北方向，去保护那些红袍了。”

languages.text: "Talim Çavuşu Jovakha da kuzeydoğudaki kırmızı cübbelileri korumak için ilerledi."
languages.original_text: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha has advanced to protect the red robes in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: "Talim Çavuşu Jovakha da kuzeydoğudaki kırmızı cübbelileri korumak için ilerledi."
